Name: GRAPHICS_CONFIG_CS_AA_QUALITY_DETAIL
Description: Determines the parameters of each anti-aliasing quality level.

Fields.Name: Enable Anti-Aliasing
Fields.Description: If ON, then anti-aliasing is enabled.

Fields.Name: Force Fast Approximate Anti-Aliasing
Fields.Description: If ON, then force anti-alias to downgrade to fast approximate anti-aliasing (FXAA2).
